title: The Agent Payments Stack
description: Every major payment network is building rails for AI agents. 98.6% of volume settles in USDC.
author: @jordanlyall

projects.name: Virtuals Protocol
projects.description: Launchpad for tokenized AI agents on Base. Agents earn revenue and share it with token holders.

projects.name: ElizaOS
projects.description: Open-source multi-agent framework from ai16z. The most-forked agent runtime for deploying autonomous agents.

projects.name: Olas
projects.description: Decentralized protocol for co-owned AI agents. Agents operate as autonomous services and earn from their work.

projects.name: Botto
projects.description: Autonomous AI artist that creates and sells generative art on-chain. Governed by community token holders.

projects.name: Axiom
projects.description: On-chain trading agent platform on Solana. Enables automated execution of DeFi strategies.

projects.name: Theoriq
projects.description: Agent marketplace and composition framework. Agents are composable building blocks that can be hired and paid.

projects.name: Giza ARMA
projects.description: Autonomous yield-optimization agent on Base and Starknet. Manages DeFi strategies via verifiable ML models with native agent-to-agent payment primitives.

projects.name: Almanak
projects.description: AI agent platform for DeFi strategy simulation and execution. Backtests and deploys autonomous on-chain trading strategies.

projects.name: Brahma.fi
projects.description: On-chain execution environment for DeFi agents. Provides safe execution rails with programmable spending controls.

projects.name: x402engine
projects.description: Application layer built on x402. Enables agents to pay for and consume web services via HTTP 402 payment flows.

projects.name: Nansen
projects.description: Blockchain analytics platform with agent-friendly APIs. Provides wallet intelligence and on-chain signal data for agent decision-making.

projects.name: Akash
projects.description: Decentralized cloud compute marketplace. Agents pay for GPU and CPU resources in USDC or AKT.

projects.name: Art Blocks
projects.description: Generative art platform on Ethereum. Primary venue for agent-purchased on-chain art; mint.day is built on its protocol.

projects.name: mint.day
projects.description: Agent-native NFT minting protocol. Lets autonomous agents mint and collect generative art on-chain.

projects.name: Apify
projects.description: Web scraping and automation platform. Agents pay per actor run via Apify's API marketplace.

projects.name: Render
projects.description: Decentralized GPU rendering network. Agents pay for compute in RNDR or USDC for inference and rendering workloads.

projects.name: Ocean Protocol
projects.description: Data marketplace and monetization protocol. Agents buy and sell datasets using OCEAN tokens.

projects.name: Run402
projects.description: x402 application demonstrating pay-per-request API access. Reference implementation for HTTP 402 agent payment flows.

projects.name: Cascade
projects.description: Solana agent infrastructure combining x402 payment facilitation, on-chain identity, and permissionless payment splitting for autonomous agents.

projects.name: Kraken CLI
projects.description: Exchange CLI with built-in MCP server. 134 commands. First exchange natively compatible with Claude Code.

projects.name: Monitor
projects.description: Agent swarm dispatcher with budget assignment and live ops

projects.name: Payload Exchange
projects.description: Intent orderbook where agents post wants, solvers compete

projects.name: Solver as a Service
projects.description: Cross-chain Polymarket trading for agents

projects.name: AgentResearch
projects.description: Autonomous research agent paying for every API call in USDC on Base

projects.name: Ramp Agent Cards
projects.description: Corporate card product with AI agent spending controls. Lets enterprises set budgets and policies for autonomous agents.

projects.name: Brex
projects.description: Corporate spend management platform. Acquired by Capital One for $5.15B; its agent card infrastructure now under Capital One.

projects.name: Skyfire KYA
projects.description: Know-Your-Agent identity verification layer. Enables agents to prove identity and authorization before spending.

projects.name: Sponge Gateway
projects.description: API layer (YC W26) that lets businesses sell directly to AI agents. Handles autonomous onboarding and payment without human credit cards or API keys.

projects.name: Payman AI
projects.description: Agent authorization and spending limit infrastructure. Lets humans set budgets and approve thresholds for AI agent transactions.

projects.name: ERC-8004
projects.description: Ethereum standard establishing on-chain identity and reputation registries for AI agents. Enables verifiable trust that underpins safe autonomous payment interactions.

projects.name: OWS Policies
projects.description: MoonPay's open-source pre-signing policy engine. Enforces agent spending limits, contract allowlists, and time-bound authorizations before any key is touched.

projects.name: Visa Intelligent Commerce
projects.description: Visa's agentic commerce framework. Extends card network rails to support autonomous agent purchases at scale.

projects.name: Stripe SPTs
projects.description: Stripe's Stablecoin Payment Tokens standard. Enables merchants to accept USDC payments through Stripe's existing rails.

projects.name: Crossmint
projects.description: Multi-chain infrastructure for wallets, minting, and payments. Provides REST APIs for agent spending policy enforcement.

projects.name: Mastercard Agentic Tokens
projects.description: Mastercard's tokenized payment credentials for AI agents. Extends card tokenization standards to non-human actors.

projects.name: AgentPay
projects.description: Agent-to-agent payment and authorization layer. Enables micropayments and spending policy enforcement between autonomous agents.

projects.name: GhostSpeak
projects.description: Solana-based AI agent commerce protocol with on-chain reputation scoring. Provides verifiable credentials and transaction history for trusted agent-to-agent service trading.

projects.name: Observer Protocol
projects.description: Cryptographically verifiable registry for agent payment history and settlement reliability. Establishes counterparty trust before delegating economic authority to agents.

projects.name: Verifiable Intent
projects.description: Mastercard's framework for verifying agent purchase intent. Cryptographic proof that an agent was authorized before spending.

projects.name: OpenMatter
projects.description: ZK execution firewall for payment MCPs. Wraps Stripe MCP with a RISC Zero zkVM — blocks malformed tool calls, threshold decryption for API keys, PII redaction before logs.

projects.name: SpendOS
projects.description: 'Ramp/Mercury for AI agents' with policies and audit trails

projects.name: BotPolice
projects.description: Runtime policy layer: may this agent pay this vendor?

projects.name: Agent Escrow
projects.description: Three-party escrow with LLM judge evaluation

projects.name: Agent Credit Protocol
projects.description: ERC-4626 vault giving agents credit lines for paid services

projects.name: Kartein
projects.description: Programmable spending firewall for autonomous agents

projects.name: RageQuit Escrow
projects.description: Smart-contract payment control layer queuing payouts into escrow

projects.name: SpendBound
projects.description: Guardrail and receipt layer for agentic vendor payments on Base

projects.name: Agent Allowance
projects.description: Agent allowance protocol: operating budgets without principal access

projects.name: Delegata
projects.description: OAuth for AI agents: scoped, revocable spending permissions onchain

projects.name: Wardex
projects.description: Policy firewall and verification for DeFi transactions

projects.name: AgentEscrow
projects.description: Trustless task escrow between AI agents

projects.name: Lookout
projects.description: Credit score for AI agents based on onchain behavior

projects.name: LitCredit
projects.description: Sealed underwriting service for stablecoin agents

projects.name: Normandy
projects.description: Undercollateralized lending on Solana where agents borrow against reputation

projects.name: x402
projects.description: HTTP-native payment protocol for AI agents built on the 402 status code. Open-source, Coinbase-developed.

projects.name: Tempo MPP
projects.description: Multi-party payment protocol for agent service networks. Connects 100+ services via a shared payment coordination layer.

projects.name: Google AP2
projects.description: Google's Agent-to-Agent Payment protocol. In development with 60+ partners; designed for enterprise-scale agent commerce.

projects.name: ACP
projects.description: Agentic Commerce Protocol co-developed by OpenAI and Stripe. Standardizes how agents initiate and settle purchases.

projects.name: Circle Nanopayments
projects.description: Circle's micropayment infrastructure for USDC. Optimized for high-frequency, low-value agent transactions.

projects.name: L402 / Lightning
projects.description: Lightning Network payment protocol adapted for API monetization. Agents pay per request using Bitcoin micropayments.

projects.name: ATXP
projects.description: HTTP-style protocol for instant, nested, delegated micropayments between AI agents. Built by Circuit & Chisel ($19.2M); integrates with Stripe's Tempo blockchain.

projects.name: Fewsats
projects.description: L402-based payment infrastructure for agents. Enables autonomous agents to pay for APIs and services via Bitcoin Lightning.

projects.name: Superfluid
projects.description: Real-time token streaming protocol on EVM chains. Enables continuous per-second payments for ongoing agent service subscriptions.

projects.name: ERC-8183
projects.description: Ethereum standard defining a three-party trustless escrow flow for autonomous agent work. Clients, providers, and evaluators settle without human intervention.

projects.name: Interledger
projects.description: Open protocol for sending payments across different ledgers and networks. Network-agnostic payment routing for agents.

projects.name: AgentPay
projects.description: Agent-to-agent payment protocol. Handles micropayment flows between autonomous agents across services.

projects.name: Dhali
projects.description: API monetization protocol with sub-cent micropayments. Lets developers charge per API call; agents pay automatically at runtime.

projects.name: x402s SCP
projects.description: Coinbase's HTTP 402 payment protocol ported to Solana. Enables sub-cent, ~400ms agent micropayments via the x402-solana package.

projects.name: Faremeter
projects.description: Open-source framework for pay-per-use web3 payments via HTTP 402. Supports EVM and Solana wallet SDKs through standard web infrastructure.

projects.name: Masumi
projects.description: Cardano-based agent payment and identity network. Enables agents to register, get paid, and prove provenance on Cardano.

projects.name: Backpac
projects.description: Solana RPC load balancer with x402 integration. Provides deterministic transaction routing and verifiable stablecoin settlement for agent payment flows.

projects.name: mpp-gateway
projects.description: Brings 43 non-MPP APIs behind one payment layer

projects.name: Dossier
projects.description: $0.01/query deep research service via MPP

projects.name: MPP Dynamic Pricing
projects.description: Surge pricing for AI inference endpoints

projects.name: Private MPP
projects.description: Privacy-preserving agent audit trail via ZK proofs

projects.name: human402
projects.description: Agent-to-human task marketplace

projects.name: AgentNet
projects.description: Social network where agents tip each other in USDC

projects.name: Parley Protocol
projects.description: Agent-to-agent content negotiation and micropayment settlement on Base

projects.name: zkx402
projects.description: ZK-verified micropayments on Celo with identity-aware pricing

projects.name: Shulam
projects.description: Enterprise-grade x402 facilitator with compliance infrastructure

projects.name: Skyfire
projects.description: AI agent payment network. Handles wallet provisioning, identity, and payment routing for autonomous agents end-to-end.

projects.name: Mesh
projects.description: Crypto portfolio aggregator and payment router. Enables agents to move funds across wallets and exchanges via unified API.

projects.name: Crossmint
projects.description: Multi-chain infrastructure for wallets, minting, and payments. Routes agent transactions across chains via REST API.

projects.name: Biconomy DAN
projects.description: Decentralized Authorization Network for account abstraction. Routes agent transactions across chains with gas sponsorship.

projects.name: BVNK
projects.description: Crypto payment infrastructure for enterprises. Acquired by Mastercard for $1.8B; bridges fiat and crypto payment rails.

projects.name: Unifold
projects.description: Developer API (YC W26) abstracting multi-chain crypto deposits into under 10 lines of code. Enables agents to accept payments from Ethereum, Solana, Bitcoin, and more.

projects.name: Circle CCTP
projects.description: Circle's Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol for native USDC. Burn-and-mint bridging enabling fast USDC movement across chains.

projects.name: Bridge
projects.description: Stablecoin infrastructure and cross-border payment rails. Acquired by Stripe for $1.1B.

projects.name: Across
projects.description: Optimistic bridge protocol for fast cross-chain token transfers. Low-latency USDC bridging used in agent payment stacks.

projects.name: Li.Fi
projects.description: Cross-chain DEX aggregator and bridge router. Finds optimal routes for token swaps and bridges across 30+ chains.

projects.name: Socket
projects.description: Cross-chain interoperability protocol. Routes token transfers and messages across chains via the best available bridge.

projects.name: deBridge
projects.description: Cross-chain messaging and liquidity protocol. Enables agents to trigger actions and move funds across EVM-compatible chains.

projects.name: Wormhole
projects.description: Cross-chain messaging protocol connecting 20+ blockchains. Core infrastructure for multi-chain agent payment routing.

projects.name: LayerZero
projects.description: Omnichain interoperability protocol. Enables agent payment messages and token transfers across any connected chain.

projects.name: Jupiter
projects.description: Solana's primary DEX aggregator. Routes token swaps across all Solana liquidity sources for best execution.

projects.name: 1inch
projects.description: EVM DEX aggregator routing across 300+ liquidity sources. Finds best swap rates for agent token conversions on-chain.

projects.name: Uniswap
projects.description: Leading EVM DEX with programmatic swap APIs. Primary on-chain liquidity source for agent token swaps.

projects.name: CoW Protocol
projects.description: Intent-based DEX on Ethereum. Batches orders for MEV protection — useful for large agent settlement transactions.

projects.name: MoonPay
projects.description: Fiat-to-crypto onramp and payment routing. Provides agents access to 80+ payment methods and cross-border rails.

projects.name: ReqCast
projects.description: x402-based payment gateway that sits between AI agents and tool developers. Agents pay per API call in USDC; developers receive 95% instantly with zero payment code required. Live on Base mainnet.

projects.name: Kibble
projects.description: Cross-chain wallet funding skill for agents. Solves the cold-start problem: bridges USDC to the right chain via LI.FI before first payment. npm install kibble-pay.

projects.name: Reveel
projects.description: Cross-chain stablecoin payment network with human-readable Pay(ID) usernames. Receive any stablecoin on any chain, settle in preferred currency. Explicitly agent-native.

projects.name: Coinbase Agentic Wallets
projects.description: Server-side MPC wallets for AI agents. API-native, no seed phrase. Part of Coinbase Developer Platform.

projects.name: MoonPay OWS
projects.description: MoonPay's Open Wallet Standard. Interoperable wallet infrastructure letting agents operate across multiple custodians.

projects.name: Crossmint
projects.description: Multi-chain wallet and NFT custody infrastructure. Provides REST APIs for agent wallet creation and asset management.

projects.name: Thirdweb
projects.description: Full-stack web3 development platform. Provides smart wallets, auth, and payment APIs for agent-integrated applications.

projects.name: Openfort
projects.description: Gaming-focused smart wallet infrastructure. Provides session keys and spending policies for agent-controlled wallets.

projects.name: World AgentKit
projects.description: World ID-verified agent wallet framework. Combines biometric identity with programmable agent spending controls.

projects.name: Turnkey
projects.description: API-first key management infrastructure. MPC signing service for secure agent transaction authorization at scale.

projects.name: Privy
projects.description: Embedded wallet infrastructure for consumer apps. Acquired by Stripe; now powers Stripe's wallet and auth stack.

projects.name: Dynamic
projects.description: Multi-chain auth and wallet SDK. Acquired by Fireblocks; brings consumer wallet UX to enterprise custody infrastructure.

projects.name: Lit Protocol
projects.description: Decentralized key management and threshold cryptography. Enables programmable signing conditions for agent wallets.

projects.name: Safe
projects.description: Smart account standard for EVM chains. Multi-sig and programmable spending rules; widely used in agent treasury management.

projects.name: ZeroDev
projects.description: Account abstraction SDK and smart wallet provider. Acquired by Arbitrum; provides gasless transactions and session keys for agents.

projects.name: Biconomy
projects.description: Account abstraction and smart wallet infrastructure. Gas sponsorship, batched transactions, and session keys for agent wallets.
projects.editorial: Mid-migration: biconomy-client-sdk (v4.5.7, deprecated) being replaced by @biconomy/abstractjs (v1.1.20, active). Newer package already has higher weekly downloads.

projects.name: Fireblocks
projects.description: Institutional MPC custody and wallet infrastructure. Industry standard for enterprise-grade key management at scale.

projects.name: Alchemy
projects.description: EVM node infrastructure and smart wallet APIs. Provides account abstraction and transaction simulation for agent builders.
projects.editorial: alchemy-sdk deprecated Jan 2026 (archived). Users directed to @account-kit/core, Viem, or Solana Web3JS. Still 54K weekly npm downloads — significant legacy drag.

projects.name: Phantom
projects.description: Multi-chain wallet with Solana focus. Increasingly relevant as Solana becomes a primary agent payment settlement chain.

projects.name: WalletConnect
projects.description: Open protocol for wallet-to-application connections. Enables agents to interact with any WalletConnect-compatible dApp.
projects.editorial: Rebranded to Reown. @walletconnect packages now under reown-npm-org. web3wallet deprecated in favor of Reown WalletKit.

projects.name: Dfns
projects.description: API-first MPC wallet infrastructure for developers. White-label key management with programmable signing policies for agents.

projects.name: Natural
projects.description: FDIC-insured accounts for AI agents with unified fiat and stablecoin balances ($9.8M seed). MCP integrations let agents autonomously send, receive, and manage payments.

projects.name: Base
projects.description: Coinbase's Ethereum L2. Primary settlement chain for agent payments; 119M+ monthly transactions.

projects.name: Solana
projects.description: High-throughput L1 blockchain. Increasingly favored for agent micropayment settlement due to speed and low fees.

projects.name: Ethereum
projects.description: The foundational smart contract platform. Settlement layer for most DeFi protocols and agent payment infrastructure.

projects.name: Tempo
projects.description: Regulated stablecoin payment network. $5B+ in transaction volume; focused on compliant cross-border settlement.

projects.name: Arbitrum
projects.description: Ethereum L2 with the largest DeFi TVL. Low-cost settlement layer for agent transactions requiring EVM compatibility.

projects.name: Sui
projects.description: High-throughput L1 with object-centric model. Emerging agent payment settlement chain with sub-second finality.

projects.name: Polygon
projects.description: Ethereum scaling network with PoS and ZK rollup options. Low-fee settlement for agent payment transactions.

projects.name: BNB Chain
projects.description: Binance's EVM-compatible L1. High throughput and low fees; significant agent payment volume especially in Asia.

projects.name: Gnosis
projects.description: EVM chain optimized for stablecoin transactions. Home of Safe smart accounts; widely used in agent treasury setups.

projects.name: NEAR
projects.description: Layer 1 with account abstraction native to the protocol. Early-stage but architecturally well-suited for agent payment patterns.

projects.name: Avalanche
projects.description: High-throughput EVM-compatible L1 with subnet architecture. Used for enterprise agent payment settlement.

projects.name: Kite
projects.description: EVM-compatible Layer 1 purpose-built for autonomous AI agent payment settlement ($33M+, PayPal Ventures). Provides programmable spend rules and coordination infrastructure for agent commerce.

projects.name: SKALE
projects.description: Gas-free Ethereum L2 network. Zero gas fees make it practical for high-frequency agent micropayment settlement.

status_legend.early: Live but early-stage or limited access
